summary: Comprehensive testing of Hytale World Builder P3 features completed successfully. All 33 backend API endpoints working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend UI fully functional with all P3 features operational including Community Gallery, Custom Prefabs, Real-time WebSocket Collaboration, Procedural Generation Preview, and Performance Analytics Dashboard.

design_issues.issue: Missing Description or aria-describedby warnings in console

passed_tests: P3: Custom Prefabs List API returns custom prefabs list
P3: Custom Prefabs Create API creates custom prefab successfully
P3: Gallery List API returns gallery entries with pagination
P3: Gallery Publish API publishes world to gallery
P3: Gallery Get Entry API returns entry and increments views correctly
P3: Gallery Like API increments likes successfully
P3: Gallery Download API returns world data
P3: Analytics Track API tracks events successfully
P3: Analytics World API returns world analytics
P3: Analytics Summary API returns platform stats
P3: Procedural Preview API generates 5 steps correctly
Frontend Gallery button opens Community Gallery dialog
Frontend Analytics button opens Analytics Dashboard
Frontend Publish to Gallery button opens publish dialog
Frontend header shows all P3 buttons (Users, 3D, Globe, Chart)
Gallery search and sort filters work correctly
Analytics shows platform stats with 7 stat cards
Procedural preview accessible via AI Auto-Generate dialog
WebSocket collaboration shows connection status and user count
All P3 dialogs open and close correctly
Gallery search input functional
Gallery sort dropdown functional (Most Recent, Most Viewed, etc.)
Publish form has all required fields (creator, description, tags)
Auto-generate prompt input functional
Collaboration badge shows online user count
All existing MVP and P2 features continue to work
Map canvas displays rich world with zones and prefabs
Terrain panel with all sliders functional
AI integration working with GPT-5.2, Claude, and Gemini options
